component.name: MediaHarbor
component.summary: Stream music and manage your local media library

description.p: MediaHarbor is a cross-platform music downloader and player. It connects to Spotify, Tidal, Qobuz, Deezer, Apple Music, and more, letting you download tracks at their native source quality and play them from a local library.

ul.li: High-quality audio downloads from major streaming services
Built-in player with shuffle, repeat, crossfade, and visualizer
Lyrics display with word-level and line-level sync
Automatic metadata tagging and cover art embedding
Local library management with file watching

screenshot.caption: Downloads page with active and completed tracks
Now-playing full-screen with visualizer and synced lyrics

description.p: Full rewrite as a native desktop app using Tauri v2, React, and TypeScript:

ul.li: Native streaming and downloading from Spotify, Tidal, Qobuz, Deezer, Apple Music, and YouTube
Built-in player with shuffle, repeat, crossfade, and audio visualizer
Synced lyrics (word-level and line-level) and full-screen now-playing view
Local library management with automatic file watching and metadata tagging
OrpheusDL integration for additional service support

description.p: Complete rewrite using Tauri + React + TypeScript:

ul.li: Native streaming clients for Spotify, Apple Music, Tidal, Qobuz, and Deezer
Built-in player with shuffle, repeat, crossfade, and audio visualizer
Synced lyrics (word-level and line-level) and now-playing full-screen mode
Local library management with automatic file watching and metadata tagging
Improved Python dependency installer
Fixed Bento4 and FFmpeg not being added to PATH
New hamburger navigation menu
Track list support for playlists and albums
Various bug fixes and UI improvements
Redesigned first-start setup page to fix installation problems
Added mediaharbor:// protocol support
Fixed database folder creation
